heading: Research and education grants for the study of antibiotic-resistant bacteria
label: 3202 Research and education grants for the study of antibiotic-resistant bacteria
notes: Codificationand enacted identical sections. was repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. children.label: A
children.text: movement of antibiotic-resistant bacteria into groundwater and surface water; and

children.label: B
children.text: the effect on antibiotic resistance from various drug use regimens; and

children.label: A
children.text: methods and practices of animal husbandry;

children.label: B
children.text: safe and effective alternatives to antibiotics;

children.label: C
children.text: the development of better veterinary diagnostics to improve decisionmaking; and

children.text: the identification of conditions or factors that affect antibiotic use on farms.

children.heading: Administration
children.label: b Administration
children.text: Paragraphs (4), (7), (8), and (11)(B) of subsection (b) of shall apply with respect to the making of grants under this section.section 3157 of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as are necessary to carry out this section for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2012.
